attacking_style: Not an attacker — pure high-tempo domestique who sets sustained, ferocious pace on climbs and punchy terrain to control race for teammates.
team_tactics: Deployed early in critical climbs to set prolonged, peloton-shredding pace that establishes team control before protected riders attack. Extended efforts of 20+ km typical.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained climbs and punchy non-categorized drags where prolonged tempo work fragments the peloton. Mountain domestique role suits best.
vulnerability: Empties completely after extended efforts (5-6km before finish), leaving no capacity for late positioning or personal results. Pure sacrifice role.
key_patterns: Sets exceptionally long pace efforts: 28km+ documented, well beyond typical domestique range.
Deployed on both categorized climbs and punchy uncategorized terrain to shred pelotons.
Ineos/team depth weapon: used to establish control before protected riders make moves.
Completely empties tank after extended work, no residual capacity for finale positioning.
form_trajectory: neutral: Both observations show identical high-level domestique role across 3-year span, no evolution apparent
